problems.diagnostic: named thing must be an expression with a type
problems.cause: AGREE guarantee statements in component type scope reference implementation-level subcomponent ports
problems.minimal_edit: Move the AGREE annex block from MAGNETO type to MAGNETO.IMPL implementation

executor_steps: Remove the annex agree block from the MAGNETO component type
Add a new annex agree block to the MAGNETO.IMPL component implementation
Within the new implementation annex, replace the guarantee statements with assign statements that relate the implementation's output ports to the corresponding input ports
Use the exact identifiers mag_out_data_x, mag_out_data_y, mag_out_data_z, mag_in_data_x, mag_in_data_y, mag_in_data_z as specified in the interface
